items.title: Pizza Donna Verde
items.description: Grilled aubergine, grilled zucchini, grilled mushrooms, red onion, yellow datterini passata, rocket, basil

items.description: Salami Napoli, Nduja cream, ricotta, green Pomodori semisecchi, Mozzarella Fior di Latte, basil
